query: SELECT vr.id, vr.lojaDestinoId, vr.lojaScanId, vr.destinatarioRaw, vr.estado, vr.createdAt, l.nome as lojaNome FROM vidros_recepcao vr LEFT JOIN lojas l ON vr.lojaDestinoId = l.id ORDER BY vr.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT vr.id, vr.lojaDestinoId, vr.lojaScanId, vr.destinatarioRaw, vr.estado, vr.createdAt, l.nome as lojaNome FROM vidros_recepcao vr LEFT JOIN lojas l ON vr.lojaDestinoId = l.id ORDER BY vr.createdAt DESC;
